name: repo-clean
description: A deliberately benign source tree (no injection sinks, secrets, unsafe deserialization, or vulnerable deps). FP-control for the SAST/SCA/secret pipeline — the noisiest detection class — where a correct scan raises zero high/critical findings.

competitors.leaderboard: Veracode / Checkmarx / Fortify / SonarQube (OWASP Benchmark SAST cohort)
competitors.note: Specificity / false-positive companion to repo-owasp-benchmark (sensitivity). SAST tools are judged on Youden = sensitivity + specificity − 1, so a low FP rate on benign code is half the score. FP bar tracks the XBOW 'no false positives' standard. runnable=false until the bench mounts a repo source tree into the sandbox (same blocker as repo-owasp-benchmark).
